```plantuml
@startuml

class GUI

interface IController {
    getPlanets()
    addPlanet(Planet)
    updatePlanet(Planet)
    deletePlanetById(int)
    getUFOsByPlanetId(int)
    addUFOToPlanet(UFO, int)
    updateUFO(UFO)
    deleteUFOById(int)
    deleteUFOsByPlanetId(int)
}

class Controller

interface IDatabase {
    getPlanets()
    savePlanet()
    deltePlanet()
    newPlanet()
}

class RelationalDatabase

GUI ..> IController
Controller ..|> IController
Controller ..> IDatabase
RelationalDatabase ..|> IDatabase

@enduml
```
